task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible, indicating successful login past the initial login screen.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Administration settings to configure the announcement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration panel or Workspace settings page is open in the Rocket.Chat interface.

task_completion.description: The global announcement banner is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A toggle switch or checkbox for enabling the custom announcement is turned on.

task_completion.description: The announcement text is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box contains the text '⚠️ CRITICAL: Scheduled Maintenance on Saturday, March 14 at 22:00 UTC. Expect service interruptions.' or the keywords 'Saturday', 'March 14', and '22:00 UTC'.

task_completion.description: The announcement style is set to 'Danger' (Red).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selector for the banner style is set to 'Danger' or shows a red color option selected.

task_completion.description: The option to allow users to dismiss the banner is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A toggle or checkbox for 'Allow User to Dismiss' (or similar wording) is turned off or disabled.

task_completion.description: The changes are saved and the banner is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save changes' button was clicked (showing a success toast) OR the red danger banner with the correct text is visible at the top of the Rocket.Chat interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to configure the banner.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Rocket.Chat admin UI, not a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat interface is fully rendered in a browser, not a text editor or a local HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the banner appearance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (F12/Inspect Element) are not open in the screenshots showing the final banner.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected text keywords: ['Saturday', 'March 14', '22:00 UTC']. Expected style: 'danger' (Red). The task requires configuring an announcement banner from scratch in the Rocket.Chat UI.
